resources.string: Enable notifications to keep the emulator running
Notifications are turned off for this app
FujiNet Go 800 runs the emulator in a foreground service. Android can stop that service if the app is not allowed to post notifications.
Android is currently blocking all notifications for FujiNet Go 800. Turn them back on in system settings so the foreground emulator service can stay alive.
You only need a low-priority status notification while the emulator is active. It lets Android keep the runtime alive instead of sending the app back to the home screen.
